# Lupo Dumpster Rentals

> Lupo Enterprises LLC (doing business as Lupo Dumpster Rentals) is a locally owned roll-off dumpster rental and full-service junk removal company headquartered in Holiday, FL. We deliver 10, 15, and 20-yard dump trailers across Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, and Hillsborough counties with flat-rate pricing, same-day or next-day drop-off, and no hidden fees. Our #1 service area is New Port Richey, FL.

## About

- **Legal name:** Lupo Enterprises LLC
- **Brand:** Lupo Dumpster Rentals
- **Headquarters:** 5647 Andrea Dr, Holiday, FL 34690, USA
- **Latitude / Longitude:** 28.1882, -82.7393
- **Phone (tap-to-call):** [(727) 317-6717](tel:7273176717)
- **Email:** a.lupollc@gmail.com
- **Website:** <https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com>
- **Logo:** <https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/logo.svg>
- **Hero image:** <https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/dumpster-rental-pros.jpg>
- **Languages:** English
- **Hours:** Open every day, 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM Eastern (including weekends)
- **Rating:** 4.9 out of 5 stars from 130+ verified customer reviews
- **Credentials:** Licensed & insured · Locally owned & operated · Flat-rate transparent pricing · Same-day & next-day service available · 5+ years in business

## Mission

Make disposal simple for Florida homeowners, contractors, and property managers with quick scheduling, flat-rate pricing, and responsive service. We help customers reclaim their space — one cleanout, remodel, or roofing job at a time.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/): Overview of dumpster rental and junk removal services across Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, and Hillsborough counties.
- [Dumpster Rental in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-new-port-richey-fl): Primary service-area hub — 10/15/20-yard roll-off dumpsters with same-day delivery in New Port Richey.
- [Contact / Request a Free Quote](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/contact): Contact form for a flat-rate quote, availability check, or delivery scheduling.
- [Pricing & Sizes](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/dumpster-rental-pricing): How our flat-rate pricing works and which dumpster size fits which project.
- [Service Locations](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/service-locations): Directory of every Florida city and county we serve.
- [About Us](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/about-us): Company story, leadership (Alex Lupo, Amanda Lupo), and what makes Lupo different from national dumpster chains.
- [Blog](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog): Long-form guides on dumpster sizing, junk removal, estate cleanouts, and renovation waste management.

## Dumpster rental & roll-off services

- [Dumpster Trailer Rentals](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-trailer-rental): Overview of our 10/15/20-yard dump trailer fleet and delivery process.
- [Dumpster Rental (general)](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental): General service page covering roll-off rental for residential and commercial projects.
- [10-Yard Dump Trailer Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/10-yard-dump-trailer): Small project size — garage cleanouts, small remodels, yard debris (~3 pickup truck loads).
- [15-Yard Dump Trailer Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/15-yard-dump-trailer): Medium project size — kitchen remodels, flooring tear-out, basement cleanouts (~4–5 pickup truck loads).
- [20-Yard Dump Trailer Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/20-yard-dump-trailer): Large project size — whole-home renovations, construction debris, full property cleanouts (~6–7 pickup truck loads).
- [Construction Dumpster Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/construction-dumpster-rental): Contractor-focused roll-offs for framing, drywall, demolition, and jobsite cleanup.

## Junk removal & cleanout services

- [Junk Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/junk-removal): Full-service loading and hauling for residential and commercial clients.
- [Junk Pickup](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/junk-pick-up): On-demand junk pickup where we load and haul — you don't lift a thing.
- [Junk Removal in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/junk-removal-new-port-richey-fl): NPR-specific junk removal page with local pricing and availability.
- [Junk Removal in Palm Harbor, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/junk-removal-palm-harbor): Palm Harbor junk removal and haul-away service.
- [Junk Removal in Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/junk-removal-port-richey): Port Richey junk removal and haul-away service.
- [Haul-Away Junk Service](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/haul-away-junk): Single-item and multi-item haul-away for heavy or awkward junk.
- [Trash Pickup](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/trash-pick-up): Scheduled trash pickup for homes and businesses.
- [Trash Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/trash-removal): General trash and waste removal across our service area.
- [Garbage Removal Service](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/garbage-removal-service): Recurring or one-time garbage removal for properties we serve.
- [Pasco County Trash Pickup](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/pasco-county-trash-pickup): Pasco County-wide trash pickup and haul-away.

## Specialty removal services

- [Appliance Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/appliance-removal): Refrigerators, ovens, washers, dryers, AC units — with responsible recycling where possible.
- [Appliance Removal in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/appliance-removal-new-port-richey-fl): NPR-specific appliance removal page.
- [Furniture Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/furniture-removal): Couches, mattresses, dressers, desks — we load and haul.
- [Mattress Disposal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/mattress-disposal): Mattress and box-spring disposal following Florida recycling guidelines.
- [Garage Cleanout Service](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/garage-cleaning-service): Full garage cleanouts — we sort, load, and haul.
- [Garage Cleanout in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/garage-cleaning-service-new-port-richey-fl): NPR-specific garage cleanout page.
- [Hoarding Cleanup](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/hoarding-cleanup): Discreet, compassionate hoarding cleanup for homes and estates.
- [Hoarding Cleanup in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/hoarding-cleanup-new-port-richey-fl): NPR-specific hoarding cleanup page.
- [Construction Debris Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/construction-debris-removal): Drywall, framing, flooring, concrete, and remodel debris.
- [Construction Debris Removal in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/construction-debris-removal-new-port-richey-fl): NPR-specific construction debris removal page.
- [Yard Waste Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/yard-waste-removal): Brush, tree trimmings, storm debris, and landscape waste.
- [Bobcat Services](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/bobcat-services): Grading, leveling, small demolition, deck removal, and debris sweep-up.

## Service areas — Pasco County, FL (primary)

- [Dumpster Rental in New Port Richey, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-new-port-richey-fl): #1 target city — roll-off dumpsters across every NPR ZIP code.
- [Dumpster Rental in Holiday, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-holiday-fl): Dumpster delivery across Holiday and surrounding Pasco communities.
- [Dumpster Rental in Trinity, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-trinity-fl): Roll-off dumpsters for Trinity homeowners and contractors.
- [Dumpster Rental in Hudson, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-hudson-fl): Same-day dumpster delivery in Hudson.
- [Dumpster Rental in Land O' Lakes, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-land-o-lakes-fl): Residential and commercial dumpsters in Land O' Lakes.
- [Dumpster Rental in Wesley Chapel, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-wesley-chapel-fl): Dumpster rental across Wesley Chapel.
- [Dumpster Rental in Zephyrhills, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-zephyrhills-fl): Dumpster rental and haul-away in Zephyrhills.
- [Dumpster Rental in Dade City, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-dade-city-fl): Dumpsters delivered across Dade City.
- [Dumpster Rental in San Antonio, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-san-antonio-fl): Roll-offs for San Antonio homes and contractors.
- [Dumpster Rental in Odessa, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-odessa-fl): Dumpster rental across Odessa.
- [Dumpster Rental in Spring Hill, FL](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/services/dumpster-rental-spring-hill): Dumpster rental in Spring Hill (northern Pasco / Hernando line).

## Industries and project types we serve

- Residential homeowners — home cleanouts, renovations, downsizing, moving
- Real estate agents & property managers — turnover cleanouts, estate cleanouts, eviction clean-ups
- Construction & renovation contractors — framing, drywall, flooring, demolition, kitchen & bath remodels
- Roofing contractors — tear-off debris, shingle disposal, whole-roof replacement projects
- Landscaping & outdoor projects — brush, tree trimming, storm debris, pool & deck tear-outs
- Commercial businesses — office cleanouts, retail renovations, restaurant remodels
- Municipal & community cleanups — neighborhood cleanup days, HOA-run projects

## Guides and blog posts

- [Ultimate Guide to Junk Removal](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/ultimate-guide-to-junk-removal): Deep guide to scoping, pricing, and scheduling a full-service junk removal.
- [How to Rent a Dumpster — Tips, Tricks & Advice](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/how-to-rent-a-dumpster-tips-tricks-and-advice): Practical walkthrough of the rental process from quote to pickup.
- [Guide to Roll-Off Dumpster Trailers — Choosing the Right Size](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/guide-to-roll-off-dumpster-trailers-choosing-the-right-size): How to pick between 10, 15, and 20-yard sizes for your project.
- [Dump Trailer Services Explained](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/dump-trailer-services-explained): What a dump trailer is, how it differs from a traditional roll-off, and when each makes sense.
- [Affordable Dumpster Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/affordable-dumpster-rental): Cost-saving tips and transparent-pricing breakdown for dumpster rentals.
- [Appliance Removal — In-Depth Guide](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/appliance-removal-in-depth-guide): Refrigerant handling, recycling options, and pricing notes for appliance removal.
- [Complete Guide to Estate Cleanout Services](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/complete-guide-to-estate-cleanout-services): Step-by-step guide for agents, executors, and families planning an estate cleanout.
- [Haul Junk Away — Your Guide to Decluttering](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/haul-junk-away-your-guide-to-decluttering): Room-by-room decluttering framework and when to call a hauler.
- [Top Five Projects That Call for a Dumpster Rental](https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/blog/top-five-projects-that-call-for-a-dumpster-rental): The five highest-ROI project types to justify renting a roll-off.

## Booking and customer support

- **Request a quote:** <https://www.lupodumpsterrentals.com/contact>
- **Phone (fastest):** [(727) 317-6717](tel:7273176717)
- **Email:** a.lupollc@gmail.com
- **Typical response time:** Within 1 business hour during operating hours (7 AM – 8 PM ET)
- **Typical delivery time:** Same-day or next-day for Pasco and northern Pinellas; 1–2 days for outer service area
